$comment: This is a draft schema for FedRAMP submissions. It is not yet finalized and may change in the future.
title: FedRAMP Certification Overview Package
description: Identification, service properties, contacts, and supporting documentation for a Cloud Service Provider FedRAMP submission.

serviceIdentification.title: Service Identification
serviceIdentification.description: Basic identification details for the Cloud Service Offering.

fedrampPackageId.title: FedRAMP ID
fedrampPackageId.description: Unique identifier assigned to the CSP by FedRAMP. If no FedRAMP ID is available, use the CSP's name and acronym.

ueiNumber.title: UEI Number
ueiNumber.description: Unique Entity Identifier (UEI) assigned to the CSP by SAM.gov. If no UEI is available leave this blank.

providerName.title: Provider Name
providerName.description: Name of the Cloud Service Provider.

serviceName.title: Service Name
serviceName.description: Full name of the Cloud Service Offering.

serviceAcronym.title: Service Acronym
serviceAcronym.description: Short acronym or abbreviation for the Cloud Service Offering.

serviceDescription.title: Service Description
serviceDescription.description: A detailed description of the Cloud Service Offering. May use Markdown for formatting.

authorizationPath.title: Authorization Path
authorizationPath.description: The FedRAMP authorization path for the Cloud Service Offering.

website.title: Website
website.description: Official website for the Cloud Service Offering.

serviceProperties.title: Service Properties
serviceProperties.description: Technical and operational properties of the Cloud Service Offering.

serviceType.title: Service Type
serviceType.description: Cloud service model(s). Select all that apply.

digitalIdentityLevel.title: Digital Identity Level
digitalIdentityLevel.description: Highest level of digital identity that the Cloud Service Offering supports.

businessFunctions.title: Business Functions
businessFunctions.description: Business functions supported by the service.

repositories.title: Repositories
repositories.description: Repository locations for system authorization documentation, policies, procedures, and assessment reports. Must include at least one Secure Configuration Guidance repository, one Trust Center repository, and one Ongoing Certification Report repository.

nextOngoingCertificationReportDate.title: Next Ongoing Certification Report Date
nextOngoingCertificationReportDate.description: The date of the next ongoing certification report for the Cloud Service Provider.

contactInformation.title: Contact Information
contactInformation.description: Key contacts for the Cloud Service Provider. Must include at least one PrimaryContact, one SecurityContact, and one SalesContact.

assessor.title: Independent Assessor
assessor.description: The Independent Assessment Service that performs verification and validation for the Cloud Service Offering.

id.title: Assessor ID
id.description: Unique identifier assigned to the assessor by FedRAMP.

certifiedServices.title: Certified Services
certifiedServices.description: Specific services included in this certification. Relevant especially for IaaS and PaaS providers with multiple products or features.

serviceName.title: Service Name
serviceName.description: Name of the service as it appears on the provider's website and in marketing materials.

serviceDescription.title: Service Description
serviceDescription.description: Description of the service. May use Markdown for formatting.

dateAvailable.title: Date Available
dateAvailable.description: Date the service became available or was authorized.

thirdPartyInformationResources.title: Third-Party Information Resources
thirdPartyInformationResources.description: Third-party information resources within the Minimum Assessment Scope for the Cloud Service Offering.

frid.title: FedRAMP ID
frid.description: Unique FedRAMP ID of the third-party information resource.

useCase.title: Use Case
useCase.description: How this resource is used in the context of this offering.

name.title: Name
name.description: Name of the third-party information resource.

provider.title: Provider
provider.description: Name of the provider of the third-party information resource.

website.title: Website
website.description: Website of the third-party information resource.

useCase.title: Use Case
useCase.description: How this resource is used in the context of this offering.

packageRequest.title: Package Request
packageRequest.description: How to access the certification package.

instructions.title: Instructions
instructions.description: Instructions for how to access this package. May use Markdown for formatting.

links.title: Links
links.description: Links to the package, an access form, a web portal, or further instructions.

serviceAvailability.title: Service Availability
serviceAvailability.description: Information about the availability of the service.

averageUptimePercentage.title: Average Uptime Percentage
averageUptimePercentage.description: Average uptime percentage for the service.

durationMinutes.title: Duration (minutes)
durationMinutes.description: Total duration of the disruption in minutes.

repositoryType.title: Repository Type
repositoryType.description: The type(s) or categories of this repository. A single repository may satisfy multiple type requirements.

authenticationRequired.title: Authentication Required
authenticationRequired.description: Whether authentication is required to access the repository.

accessRequestInstructions.title: Access Request Instructions
accessRequestInstructions.description: Instructions for requesting access to the repository. May use Markdown for formatting.

contactType.title: Contact Type
contactType.description: The role or category of this contact.
